channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports

item.title: Monfils outduels fellow Frenchman Mpetshi Perricard in an Australian Open 1st-round for the ages
item.description: MELBOURNE, Australia (AP) — The pragmatic pro in Gael Monfils would like to have finished off his first-round win in straight sets against up-and-coming fellow Frenchman Giovanni Mpetshi Perricard at the Australian Open.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, PIX 11

item.title: Sam Darnold's career-best season ends with a thud as he takes 9 sacks in playoff loss
item.description: GLENDALE, Ariz. (AP) — Sam Darnold did nearly everything right in a renaissance season, resurrecting his career as a starter while pushing Minnesota to one of the NFL's best records. A deep playoff run was the expected next step.
item.dc:creator: JOHN MARSHALL, Associated Press, PIX 11

item.title: Lakers retire Michael Cooper's No. 21 on an emotional night for the Hall of Fame guard from Pasadena
item.description: LOS ANGELES (AP) — Michael Cooper spent his entire career with the Los Angeles Lakers as a defense-minded guard who always focused on helping his Showtime teammates to be stars. When the Lakers raised Cooper's No.
item.dc:creator: GREG BEACHAM, Associated Press, PHL 17

item.title: The Athletic's Dianna Russini provides a look inside the Bears search for their next head coach
item.description: The Chicago Bears have requested interviews with 19 candidates for their next head coach, including Mike McCarthy, Thomas Brown, Ron Rivera, Ben Johnson, Todd Monken, and Steve Sarkisian, while the ambiguity around Ryan Poles' contract situation may make it more difficult for the Bears to hire their
item.dc:creator: Jarrett Payton, WGN 9

item.title: Mortgage the future? Warriors’ central question looming as deadline approaches
item.description: What Steph Curry, Draymond Green and Steve Kerr think about maximizing the team's championship window.
item.dc:creator: Danny Emerman, The Mercury News

item.title: Mike McCarthy won't return as the Cowboys' coach. Deion Sanders could be a candidate to replace him
item.description: DALLAS (AP) — Mike McCarthy will not return as coach of the Dallas Cowboys, who are going on three decades since their last Super Bowl title, owner Jerry Jones said Monday. Jones said the organization and McCarthy mutually agreed to part ways.
item.dc:creator: ROB MAADDI and SCHUYLER DIXON, Associated Press, PHL 17

item.title: Lakers, Clippers return to their home courts after days of fire devastation across Los Angeles
item.description: The Lakers and the Clippers both went back to work Monday night in Los Angeles’ first two NBA games since catastrophic wildfires killed at least 24 people and destroyed significant sections of their hometown.
item.dc:creator: Greg Beacham, Associated Press, Local 4

item.title: Eagles fan directs vile tirade at Packers fan during wild-card game, social media video shows
item.description: Philadelphia Eagles fans are known as some of the most passionate supporters in the NFL, but one fan's behavior during a playoff game is raising eyebrows.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: WWE star CM Punk gives shoutout to firefighters battling Los Angeles wildfires
item.description: WWE star CM Punk started "Monday Night Raw" with a shoutout for firefighters and first responders battling the wildfires in Los Angeles.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: NBA hits Timberwolves' Anthony Edwards with fifth fine of season
item.description: Timberwolves star guard Anthony Edwards inked a five-year max rookie extension after the 2022-23 season, but his some of his on- and off-court behavior is becoming costly.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Australian Open: Novak Djokovic and new coach Andy Murray get a win against US teen in debut
item.description: MELBOURNE, Australia (AP) — Novak Djokovic's first match with former rival Andy Murray as his coach did not start all that well, even against a 19-year-old making his Grand Slam debut.
item.dc:creator: HOWARD FENDRICH, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: LSU star Kyren Lacy arrested in connection with deadly car crash
item.description: LSU Tigers standout wide receiver Kyren Lacy was arrested on several chargers following a December incident that led to a deadly crash in Louisiana.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: On Football: A bloody face didn't stop Jayden Daniels from leading the Commanders to a comeback win
item.description: TAMPA, Fla. (AP) — Jayden Daniels doesn’t get fazed, even when a crunching hit leaves his face bloodied.
item.dc:creator: BY ROB MAADDI, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Jayden Daniels leads Commanders to first playoff win in nearly 7,000 days, 23-20 over the Buccaneers
item.description:
New owners. New general manager. New coach. New franchise quarterback.
That’s the formula — with an emphasis on the QB — that Washington rode to playoff success after nearly two decades of futility.
item.dc:creator: ROB MAADDI, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Lamar Jackson and Josh Allen will face off for a berth in the AFC championship game
item.description: Lamar Jackson vs. Josh Allen won’t decide the NFL MVP next week. The stakes are higher with a spot in the AFC championship game on the line.
item.dc:creator: ROB MAADDI, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Coaching Tracker: The Bears' search to find their next head coach
item.description: The Chicago Bears have assembled a six-person panel to find their next head coach, with Ryan Poles as the final decision-maker, and have requested to interview Joe Brady, Thomas Brown, Matt Campbell, Pete Carroll, Brian Flores, Marcus Freeman, Aaron Glenn, Joe Brady, and David Shaw.
item.dc:creator: Eli Ong, WGN 9

item.title: New England hires former Patriots Super Bowl champ Mike Vrabel as coach
item.description: The New England Patriots have hired Mike Vrabel as their head coach. The team announced the hiring Sunday morning, a week after Patriots owner Robert Kraft fired Jerod Mayo following the team’s season-ending victory over the Buffalo Bills. Mayo finished 4-13 in his lone season.
item.dc:creator: KYLE HIGHTOWER, Associated Press, NewsNation

item.title: New England Patriots hire former Super Bowl champ Mike Vrabel as next coach; Bears had interviewed him
item.description: Vrabel, a fan favorite during eight seasons as a player in New England where he was a member of its first three Super Bowl winners and an inductee into the team’s Hall of Fame in 2023, was the preferred candidate because of his long association with the franchise and coaching success.
item.dc:creator: The Associated Press, WGN 9

item.title: Utah State beats Boise State on 4-point play, 81-79
item.description: LOGAN, Utah (ABC4 Sports) - The #25 Utah State men’s basketball remained perfect in league play in dramatic fashion, defeating Boise State 81-79 in the Dee Glen Smith Spectrum.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: Jackson and Henry lead the way as the Ravens run over the rival Steelers 28-14 in the AFC playoffs
item.description: BALTIMORE (AP) — Lamar Jackson handed off to Derrick Henry, then slid out to the left as if he still had the ball. A couple linebackers shifted into Jackson's path, leaving the middle open for Henry to run through for a 44-yard touchdown.
item.dc:creator: NOAH TRISTER, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Ezra Ausar scores 21 as Utah earns first Big 12 victory
item.description: SALT LAKE CITY (ABC4 Sports) - Ezra Ausar scored a season-high 21 points in just 17 minutes of action. as the Utah basketball team won its first Big 12 Conference game Saturday, beating Oklahoma State, 83-62.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: Santa Anita postpones weekend racing as track is staging area for fire relief efforts
item.description: A flareup of the wildfire on the west side of Los Angeles that prompted new evacuations has caused Santa Anita to cancel horse racing this weekend.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: NBA postpones Rockets vs. Hawks game because of winter storm
item.description: ATLANTA (AP) — The game between the Houston Rockets and Atlanta Hawks scheduled for Saturday has been postponed because of a winter storm.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, NewsNation

item.title: Chicago faces Sacramento, aims for 5th straight home win
item.description: Sacramento Kings (19-19, ninth in the Western Conference) vs. Chicago Bulls (18-20, 10th in the Eastern Conference) Chicago; Sunday, 3:30 p.m. EST BOTTOM LINE: Chicago hosts Sacramento aiming to extend its four-game home winning streak. The Bulls have gone 8-11 at home.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, WGN 9

item.title: Lindsey Vonn impresses skiing into 6th place in her first World Cup downhill race since 2019
item.description: The racecourse commentator broadcasting Lindsey Vonn's first World Cup downhill race since 2019 — the American is age 40 and has a titanium knee — summed up how impressive the ski great's performance was.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Ohio State getting shot at 6th national title after 28-14 win over Texas in CFP semi Cotton Bowl
item.description: ARLINGTON, Texas (AP) — Jack Sawyer had the kind of moment that will live on long past his playing days with Ohio State. Of course, one more victory would make it that much sweeter.
item.dc:creator: STEPHEN HAWKINS, Associated Press, WGN 9

item.title: St. Patrick names former Notre Dame star Tom Zbikowski head football coach
item.description: CHICAGO — One of the best safeties in Notre Dame's storied football program was named head coach of Saint Patrick High School. Tom Zbikowski, 39, will take over the Northwest Side high school's football program.
item.dc:creator: Andy Koval, WGN 9
